'''dasomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noctivagant|noctivagant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noctivagant|noctivagant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dasomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsemeth|dæsemeth]] || [[word:dæsemej|dæsemej]] || [[word:dæsemesh|dæsemesh]] || [[word:dæseme|dæseme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasosomoth|dasosomoth]] || [[word:dasosomoj|dasosomoj]] || [[word:dasosomosh|dasosomosh]] || [[word:dasosomo|dasosomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasomoth|dasomoth]] || [[word:dasomoj|dasomoj]] || [[word:dasomosh|dasomosh]] || [[word:dasomo|dasomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasofmoth|dasofmoth]] || [[word:dasofmoj|dasofmoj]] || [[word:dasofmosh|dasofmosh]] || [[word:dasofmof|dasofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasomotho|dasomotho]] || [[word:dasomojo|dasomojo]] || [[word:dasomosho|dasomosho]] || [[word:dasomoko|dasomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasomoth|dasomoth]] || [[word:dasomoj|dasomoj]] || [[word:dasomosh|dasomosh]] || [[word:dasomo|dasomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasomothol|dasomothol]] || [[word:dasomojol|dasomojol]] || [[word:dasomoshol|dasomoshol]] || [[word:dasomokol|dasomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasomothotho|dasomothotho]] || [[word:dasomojojo|dasomojojo]] || [[word:dasomoshosho|dasomoshosho]] || [[word:dasomoko|dasomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasomothon|dasomothon]] || [[word:dasomojon|dasomojon]] || [[word:dasomoshon|dasomoshon]] || [[word:dasomokon|dasomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasomothoro|dasomothoro]] || [[word:dasomojoro|dasomojoro]] || [[word:dasomoshoro|dasomoshoro]] || [[word:dasomokoro|dasomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
